name: XM1014 | 刺青
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. A snake has been custom painted atop a gold-colored base in a style inspired by the Japanese tattoo art style Irezumi. Snakes represent wisdom and prophecy, two words which best describe XM1014 users
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 金色的基底上绘制了一条蛇，其风格灵感来自于日本的刺青艺术Irezumi。 蛇代表着智慧和预言，这两个词最能描述XM1014使用者
